mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month as cost of capital falls.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in >55% of rate decline periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding 0.5 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that reduce consumer spending expectations, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of triggered months or the signal loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based economic strength that boosts corporate earnings forecasts, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative forward returns in >50% of co-occurring periods or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp contractions in industrial production indicate immediate supply chain bottlenecks that trigger short-term risk-off positioning, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns within one week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >65% of contraction months or the mechanism fails to predict direction during inventory restocking phases.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly CPI inflation exceeding 5.0% forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in >55% of high-inflation months or the threshold effect disappears when controlling for nominal yield changes.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with falling unemployment rates confirms labor market tightening that supports wage growth and consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over three months.
failure_condition: The combined signal produces negative forward returns in >50% of observations or the interaction effect is indistinguishable from independent series effects.

mechanism_narrative: Increases in housing starts reflect rising household confidence and construction sector activity that immediately lifts market sentiment, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in >60% of housing start increases or the signal shows zero predictive power in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth outpacing CPI inflation indicates healthy capacity utilization without price pressures, supporting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over one month.
failure_condition: Forward returns turn negative in >55% of periods where production growth exceeds inflation or the signal loses predictive accuracy during stagflation episodes.
